emails.subject: Buyback / Deficiency Deals Worksheet
emails.body: Buyback Deficiency Deals Worksheet Please make the following changes and redistribute your worksheet. Thanks 1). Please update Equistar "Swing" Sitara ticket as: 156337. Equistar "Sale" should reflect various" due to the different deals associated with this counterparty. 2). Valero Marketing Supply "Swing" Sitara ticket #'s are as follows: Mtr. 981394......148391 Mtr. 988018......148382 Mtr. 981233......148386

emails.body: Re: Buyback Deficiency Deals Worksheet The Equistar deal 156337 is the sale and swing all in one. I only have two deals for this counterparty, one for the sale and one for the buyback. From: Robert E Lloyd 04/05/2000 02:23 PM
